Screen/State Title: From Services to Rights, Power, and Accountability

Learning/Purpose: Check whether learners can recognize the core practical meaning of HRBA after the first part of Module 1.
Learner Action: Start the quiz, answer five MCQs one at a time, review immediate feedback, see results, then continue to self-assessment.
Completion Rule: All five questions answered, result summary shown, and Continue to self-assessment clicked.

Accessibility/Low-Bandwidth: Keyboard-accessible answer buttons, text progress, aria-live feedback, no image dependency.

Learning/Purpose: Help learners assess their current HRBA readiness and generate structured inputs for priority selection and action commitment.

Learning/Purpose: Turn the learner’s self-assessment into one or two selected HRBA priority areas and one practical action commitment.
